summary: Frontend-only visual/UX verification on /hourly-booking. Header no longer overlaps the h1 title (pt-24 md:pt-28 works). Car cards now render vehicle images correctly, selection ring works, and hourly price recomputes for 2h-6h.
critical_code_review_comments: car-<key> testids include trailing space (e.g. 'car-Luxury Sedan '). Works but consider trimming key for cleaner selectors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on desktop 1920x1080: H1 top=112px, header bottom=65px (no overlap). After selecting 'Aéroport de Paris-Charles de Gaulle' via Google Places, 4 car cards rendered with real vehicle images loaded from /api/proxy/vehicle-image/*.PNG (naturalWidth=853, all complete). Clicking Luxury Sedan applied border-[#2ecc71] + bg-green-50 ring. Hours toggles yielded prices 2h=160€, 3h=220€, 4h=280€, 5h=340€, 6h=400€. Testids: hourly-h1, hourly-pickup, car-<key>, hours-<n>, hourly-price all present.
rca of the issue: N/A - verification only, both reported UX issues fixed as expected.
